allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const lines=fs.readFileSync\('框架_min_min/user/test/input.js','utf8'\).split\('\\n'\); for\(let i=1489;i<Math.min\(lines.length,1505\);i++\) console.log\(\(i+1\)+': '+lines[i].slice\(0,200\)\);")
